text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three... All right! Looks like everyone's
here!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna take some time before we're back
home, so I've made lunch for you all.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Take a lunch box and pass the rest down!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You're so cool for this! Thanks a ton,
Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You even made the sausages look like octopuses.
What attention to detail.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad no one got hurt and that this year's
training camp went as smoothly as the last.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It's nothin' special. Yawn... See, my dorm residents are a bunch of good, honest kids.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I just say the word and they'll...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, did she just fall asleep?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
She musta wok'n up real early t'make our
lunches...

And so, Hishi Amazon's sizzling summer camp
cools to a quiet end.
